title: NIMER Administrator Performance Evaluation System (NAPES)
description: Administrator performance evaluation questionnaire based on NAPES form.
privacy_reminder: The data gathered will be handled in accordance with RA 10173 or the Data Privacy Act of 2012, and will be utilised only for the intended purpose.

questions.indicator: Displays an aura of self-confidence through physical appearance, speech, and bearing
Demonstrates a contagious and encouraging positive attitude
Believes that there is much to achieve and the future is bright
Knows how to handle stressful and volatile situations
Has the ability to solve complicated problems
Completes predetermined objectives on time
Thinks outside the box
Willing to take risks and try new approaches
Exemplifies the value of self-improvement
Has the ability to express ideas clearly
Gives full attention to others when they talk
Communicates relevant information and refrains from communicating unnecessary information or oversharing
Understands and optimises non-verbal communications
Able to evoke trust from people he/she interacts with
Able to read situations and understand people's emotions
Willing to open about his/her feelings and be vulnerable
Leads the team in creating a game plan using appropriate planning tools and techniques
Knows how to read changing situations and willing to adjust plans
Makes planning a top priority activity, performed on a regular basis
Delegates authority effectively by clarifying expectations and empowering employees to succeed
Clearly communicates performance standards
Emphasises work quality and performance but avoids micromanaging
Conducts evaluation and offer useful feedbacks regularly
Exemplifies the value of leading with humility and consistency
Emphasises the importance of data analysis in problem solving and decision making
Breaks down silos (tribalism) and thinks of the organisation holistically
Committed to promoting collaboration and improving relationships
Talks about the mission, strategy, and plans with regularity
Strives to understand the needs and expectations of others
Communicates clearly the reason for change
Engages relevant stakeholders in planning and implementing programs and activities
Empowers employees through involving them in decision-making processes
Manages resources effectively and efficiently to achieve objectives
Prioritises the health, needs, and well-being of employees
Ensures that environmental health and safety measures are in place to provide safe environment for all

comments_prompts.positive_feedback: Say something positive about the person.
